faces_superseded_note: dark-face tokens superseded by the primer diagram language material law (2026-07-15 surface-invariance ruling): the diagram_dark family — ink/ink2/sig/sigt/s0/s1 from genome variant_overrides.{v}.diagram_dark — is what every dark-scheme render wears (baked face, fixed dark variant, adaptive dark branch). The authored twin specimen still records itself in faces; light face grades unamended. stroke stays authored: the material border is an rgba the hex token parser does not read — the language-law suite grades it directly.
